prompt: Cut a new release of logtool at <repo>. The project already uses our dependency.md + git-tag versioning mechanism. Work out the new version number and produce all the release artifacts.
assertions: New version is 1.3.0 — MINOR (feat) wins over PATCH (fix), and PATCH component reset to 0
dependency.md line 1 is exactly 1.3.0+<count>.g<hash> with regenerated BUILD metadata
A release_note file for 1.3.0 exists but is NOT committed (covered by .gitignore)
CHANGELOG.md gained a 1.3.0 section and is committed
Release commit tagged v1.3.0 and working tree clean
